title: ainsliaea latifolia
intro: Ainsliaea latifolia, also known as the Chinese mountain tea or broad-leaved ainsliaea, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve stress and anxiety. Ainsliaea latifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
